signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP as Payment Method | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launches XRP as Payment Method | YES | HIGH confidence**

On April 15, 2026, Rakuten Wallet went live with XRP as both a listed asset and payment method, reaching 44 million Rakuten Pay users and 5 million merchant locations[1]. Rakuten's 3 trillion loyalty points ($23 billion in circulation) can now convert to XRP[1]. This represents a major adoption milestone for XRP's real-world

signals.headline: Six Spot ETFs Now Active with ~$1B Combined AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Six Spot ETFs Now Active with ~$1B Combined AUM | YES | HIGH confidence**

By mid-April, six U.S. spot XRP ETFs are now live (Canary XRPC, Franklin Templeton, Grayscale, Bitwise, 21Shares, and Amplify) with approximately $1 billion in combined assets under management and roughly 787 million XRP locked in custody[1].
